items.name: models/gemini-2.5-flash
items.description: Stable version of Gemini 2.5 Flash, our mid-size multimodal model that supports up to 1 million tokens, released in June of 2025.

items.name: models/gemini-2.0-flash-001
items.description: Stable version of Gemini 2.0 Flash, our fast and versatile multimodal model for scaling across diverse tasks, released in January of 2025.

items.name: models/gemini-2.5-flash-lite
items.description: Stable version of Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, released in July of 2025

items.name: models/gemini-3.1-pro-preview-customtools
items.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview optimized for custom tool usage

items.name: models/deep-research-max-preview-04-2026
items.description: Preview release (April 21st, 2026) of Deep Research Max

items.name: models/deep-research-pro-preview-12-2025
items.description: Preview release (December 12th, 2025) of Deep Research Pro

items.name: models/gemini-embedding-001
items.description: Obtain a distributed representation of a text.

items.name: models/gemini-embedding-2-preview
items.description: Obtain a distributed representation of multimodal content.

items.name: models/gemini-embedding-2
items.description: Obtain a distributed representation of multimodal content.

items.name: models/aqa
items.displayName: Model that performs Attributed Question Answering.
items.description: Model trained to return answers to questions that are grounded in provided sources, along with estimating answerable probability.

items.name: models/veo-2.0-generate-001
items.description: Vertex served Veo 2 model. Access to this model requires billing to be enabled on the associated Google Cloud Platform account. Please visit https://console.cloud.google.com/billing to enable it.

headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev;child-src 'self';connect-src 'self' https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.sentry.io https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev wss://api.nango.dev/ https://connect.nango.dev https://*.posthog.com https://*.stripe.com https://*.plain.com wss://*.plain.com;font-src 'self' https://*.googleapis.com https://*.gstatic.com;frame-src 'self' https://accounts.google.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://connect.nango.dev https://www.youtube.com https://*.stripe.com;img-src 'self' data: https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com https://img.logo.dev https://*.ytimg.com https://*.plain.com;manifest-src 'self';media-src 'self';object-src 'self';script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.stripe.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://*.posthog.com https://www.youtube.com https://chat.cdn-plain.com;style-src blob: 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.googleapis.com https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev;worker-src blob: 'self' https://app.nango.dev https://api.nango.dev https://*.googleapis.com https://*.posthog.com;base-uri 'self';form-action 'self';frame-ancestors 'self';script-src-attr 'none';upgrade-insecure-requests
headers.access-control-expose-headers: Authorization, Etag, Content-Type, Content-Length, X-Nango-Signature, X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, X-RateLimit-Reset
